details.test: Task 1: Cheapest <=4-day Chicago->Paris quote and start shipment
Task 2: Create and pay for docs Toronto->NY shipment under $40
Task 3: Schedule Madrid pickup on Friday afternoon for pre-labeled packages
Task 4: Estimate customs for clothing LA->Tokyo and select prepaid option <= $60
Task 5: Find nearest Berlin drop-off open after 19:00 and save it
Task 6: Reschedule delivery for in-transit package to later time slot
Task 7: Create Shanghai business sender and save express shipment draft with $500 insurance
Task 8: Choose Amsterdam->Sydney service with CO2 <= 15kg and price <= $100
